_note: The pipeline now ships a HistGradientBoostingClassifier (see config.HGB_PARAMS). The previous committed models.json held logistic-GLM coefficients (mean/scale/coef/intercept) that the current code no longer reads — it now loads fitted boosters from outputs/models/hgb_h{h}.joblib and takes each horizon's threshold + metadata from this file. Those artifacts are not in this checkout because the raw CyAN rasters are not either. Run 03_train against the CyAN cache to regenerate this file (with the real hyperparameters, thresholds, permutation importance, and CyAN partial-dependence) and the per-horizon .joblib boosters.
